login.title: Welcome Back
login.description: Sign in to manage your products and orders
login.noAccount: Don't have an account? <0>Create an account</0>

password.min: The password must be at least {{length}} characters long.
password.max: The password must be at most {{length}} characters long.

email.title: Welcome Back
email.description: Create an account and start managing your products and orders
email.success: We sent the verification code to your email, please check your inbox.

password.min: The password must be at least {{length}} characters long.
password.max: The password must be at most {{length}} characters long.

token.title: Confirm Email
token.description: We sent the verification code to your email <0>"{{email}}"</0>, please check your inbox and enter the code below.

email.title: Reset Password
email.description: Enter your email to reset your password. We will send you an email with a verification code to verify your email in the next step.
email.success: We have sent the verification code to your email, please check your inbox.

token.title: Reset Password
token.description: We have sent the verification code to your email <0>"{{email}}"</0>, please check your inbox and enter the code below.
token.success: We verified your email, now you can create a new password!

new.title: Reset Password
new.description: Enter your new password and confirm it.

password.short: The password must be at least {{length}} characters long.
password.long: The password must be at most {{length}} characters long.

new.success: Your password has been reset, you can now log in with your new password!

resendToken.resendIn: You can request a new code in

joinOrgModal.title: {{company}} has invited you to join their organization
joinOrgModal.description: You have been invited to join <0>{{company}}'s</0> organization. Please note that your personal account data will be hidden while you are a member, and will become visible again if you choose to leave the organization.

accept.title: Accept
accept.success: Invitation accepted successfully, you became a member of the organization!

publish.title: Publish Product
publish.description: This product will become available for creating orders.

bulkPublish.title: Publish {{count}} Products
bulkPublish.description: These products will become available for creating orders.

moveToDraft.title: Move Product to Draft
moveToDraft.description: This product will be hidden from the products list by default unless the 'Show Drafts' filter is enabled, and it will no longer be available for creating new orders.

bulkMoveToDraft.title: Move {{count}} Products to Draft
bulkMoveToDraft.description: These products will be hidden from the products list by default unless the 'Show Drafts' filter is enabled, and they will no longer be available for creating new orders.

subheader.inputPlaceholder: Search by name, description, or ID...

manageStock.title: Manage Stock
manageStock.empty: Enter quantity above to view the change.

main.title: Main Image
main.description: This is the primary image shown in lists and tables. It should be square.

gallery.title: Image Gallery
gallery.description: Add images from additional angles, or packaging shots.

minStock.title: Low Stock Alert At
minStock.info: You'll be warned when the stock quantity reaches this value (Next to the quantity in the products table, in the dashboard, and during creating orders).

restrictions.tags: You do not have permission to access tags.
restrictions.categories: You do not have permission to access categories.
restrictions.tagsAndCategories: You do not have permission to access tags and categories.

subheader.inputPlaceholder: Search by customer information or ID...

items.restriction: You do not have permission to access products.

items.requiredOrRemove: Please select a product or remove this row

archive.title: Archive Order {{id}}
archive.description: Are you sure you want to archive this order? It will become read-only and hidden from orders list unless you enable the 'Show Archived' filter. This will not affect the order's status or its products' stock.

bulkArchive.title: Archive {{count}} Orders
bulkArchive.description: Are you sure you want to archive these orders? They will become read-only and hidden from orders list unless you enable the 'Show Archived' filter. This will not affect the orders' status or their products' stock.

unarchive.title: Unarchive Order {{id}}
unarchive.description: Are you sure you want to unarchive this order? It will become editable again. This will not affect the order's status or its products' stock.

bulkUnarchive.title: Unarchive {{count}} Orders
bulkUnarchive.description: Are you sure you want to unarchive these orders? They will become editable again. This will not affect the orders' status or their products' stock.

bulkManageStatus.title: Update Status for {{count}} Orders
infos: Selected delivered orders will not be updated or affected in any way.
Selected canceled orders will not be updated if the new status is 'Delivered'.

name.long: Customer name must be at most {{length}} characters.

address.long: Customer address must be at most {{length}} characters.

delete.title: Delete category "{{name}}"?
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete this category? It will be deleted and unlinked from all associated products. This action cannot be undone later.

bulkDelete.title: Delete {{count}} categories?
bulkDelete.description: Are you sure you want to delete the selected categories? They will be deleted and unlinked from all associated products. This action cannot be undone later.

delete.title: Delete tag "{{name}}"?
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete this tag? It will be deleted and unlinked from all associated products. This action cannot be undone later.

bulkDelete.title: Delete {{count}} tags?
bulkDelete.description: Are you sure you want to delete the selected tags? They will be deleted and unlinked from all associated products. This action cannot be undone later.

currency.title: Currency
currency.description: Select the currency that will be used to display prices and financial values. This currency will be applied to all prices and values across the application.

language.title: Language
language.description: Select the language that will be used in the application and the emails we send you.

threshold.title: Stock Thresholds
threshold.description: Configure the default minimum stock level to trigger low stock alerts (alerts appear in: the quantity cell in the products table, during product selection when creating a new order, and in the dashboard).
threshold.info: Products without a custom minimum stock value will use this value automatically.

minStock.min: The minimum stock level must be at least {{min}}.

password.title: Change Password
password.description: Your password must be between 6 and 64 characters long. For better security, we recommend using a mix of letters, numbers, and symbols.

errors.short: Password must be at least {{length}} characters long.

shared.orgOnlyTooltip: This setting can only be changed by the organization owner.

members.title: Members
members.subtitle: Manage members permissions

removeMember.title: Remove "{{member}}" from your organization?
removeMember.description: Are you sure you want to remove <0>{{member}}</0> from your organization? You can re-invite him later.

members.disabledCheckBoxTooltip: Read permission should be enabled first.

leaveSection.title: Danger Zone
leaveSection.description: Leaving this organization will immediately revoke your access to its resources.

leave.title: Leave Organization
leave.description: Are you sure you want to leave the organization? You will no longer have access to its resources and you’ll need a new invitation from the owner to rejoin.

cancel.title: Cancel Invitation
cancel.description: Are you sure you want to cancel the invitation for <0>{{email}}</0>?

invite.title: Invite Members
infos: Only individuals who are non-invited by you and not associated with another organization can be invited.
Upon opening the app (and creating an account if new), invitees will immediately see their pending invitation and be able to accept or decline it.
You can check delivery progress anytime under the <0>Invitations Tab</0>.
Who accepts the invitation will have read-only access to products, tags, categories and orders by default, and you can manage their permissions under the <0>Members Tab</0>.

emails.title: Recipients
emails.placeholder: Enter emails separated by commas or press Enter

errors.duplicate: This email has already been added to the list.
errors.limit: You can invite up to {{limit}} users at a time.

emails.tip: Double-click any email in the list to pull it back into the input for modifications.

warning.title: Are you sure?
warning.description: Are you sure you want to do this? Once you confirm, you cannot undo it later.
